High Roller Cocktails | A Fire in Vermon.description: Based on a classic, this Vermont-inspired cocktail is sure to light a fire in your heart. Served flaming barside, “A Fire in Vermont” features WhistlePig 10-year rye, Antica Formula vermouth, cherry brandy, Bogart’s Bitters and a flame-kissed caramelized absinthe wash.

High Roller Cocktails | Crist\u00f3bals.description: Immerse yourself in a tropical oasis when the aged flavors of Flor de Caña 18 rum crash like a tidal wave into the familiarity of tiki.

High Roller Cocktails | Silk & Lace.description: Decadent and silky smooth chocolate cherry cake Manhattan substitutes regular sweet vermouth for a house-made toasted cocoa nib and vanilla-infused ruby porto. Featuring Edison's own Makers Mark Private Selection “Olde 19, Volume II,” all of the above culminate into a true experience in a glass.

High Roller Cocktails | The Everglader.description: Florida’s St. Augustine Distillery New World Gin, Florida Orange Liqueur, pineapple juice, orange juice and Absinthe Spritz.

High Roller Cocktails | With Love, Mina.description: Tapping into the essence of time, fresh strawberries meet the ever-so-smooth Stoli Elit for a 72-hour infusion that transforms an already enjoyable vodka into something more complete. When crème de cacao, Faretti Biscotti and Woodford Reserve chocolate bitters lend a hand, you’d be foolish to say no.
